HGSS.622.0000:
Yo! Champ in the making!\f
The Gym has unstable footing.
Keep your Pokémon in their Poké Balls.\f
Now, Clair uses the mythical and sacred
Dragon-type Pokémon.\f
You can’t damage them very easily.\f
But you know, they’re supposed
to be weak against Ice-type moves.
HGSS.622.0001:
Hey!
You were great to beat Clair!\f
What she says is one thing, but you are
already quite the Trainer. I think...\f
I’d still do what Clair wants you to
do, though.
HGSS.622.0002:
Yo! Champ in the making!\f
The Gym has unstable footing.
Keep your Pokémon in their Poké Balls.\f
Now, Clair uses the mythical and sacred
Dragon-type Pokémon.\f
You can’t damage them very easily.\f
But you know, they’re supposed
to be weak against Ice-type moves.\f
HGSS.622.0003:
Clair: I am Clair.\f
The world’s best Dragon-type master.\f
I can hold my own against even the
Pokémon League’s Elite Four.\f
Do you still want to take me on?\f
...Fine.
Let’s do this!\f
As a Gym Leader, I will use my full
power against any opponent!\f
HGSS.622.0004:
Clair: I won’t concede this.\f
I might have lost, but you’re still
not ready for the Pokémon League.\f
I know. You should take the
Dragon-master challenge.\f
Behind this Gym is a place called
Dragon’s Den. There is a small shrine\r
at its heart.\r
Go there.\f
If you can prove that you’ve lost
your lazy ideals, I will admit you\r
are a Trainer worthy of a Gym Badge!
HGSS.622.0005:
Clair: What’s the matter?\f
Is it too much to expect of you?
HGSS.622.0006:
Clair: You’ve kept me waiting!\f
Here! Take this!\f
HGSS.622.0007:
Clair: That contains Dragon Pulse.\f
Well, Dragon Pulse is a kind of...umm...
Never mind!\f
It’s a huge energy of some kind.
If you don’t want it, you don’t\r
have to take it.\f
HGSS.622.0008: What is this? You don’t have room?
HGSS.622.0009:
Clair: What’s the matter?\f
Aren’t you headed to the
Pokémon League?\f
Your face...it tells me you have some
unfinished business...\f
Wait a sec!
You came from New Bark Town\r
where Professor Elm’s Lab is, right?\f
You may want to go back to
New Bark Town.\f
Whatever you have to face from now,
it’ll be more difficult.\f
But don’t you dare give up!\f
If you do, I’ll feel even worse
about having lost to you!\f
...
Give it your all.
HGSS.622.0011:
Blackthorn City Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Clair
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
